description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named uncompyle6 for Windows that runs on push and pull request events to the master branch. Use a macos-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.6, 3.7, 3.8) on Windows. The workflow should check out the repository, set up Python, install dependencies including xdis from a Git repository, install the package and development requirements, and run make check to test uncompyle6.
